title: post api auth register with valid data
description: Test user registration with valid email and password, expect 201 response with JWT token and user id.

title: post api auth login with valid credentials
description: Test user login with valid credentials, expect 200 response with JWT token.

title: get api auth me with valid jwt
description: Test fetching current user profile with valid JWT token, expect 200 response with user profile data.

title: post api project create with authorization
description: Test creating a new project with valid JWT authorization and valid project data, expect 201 response with created project id.

title: get api project list with authorization
description: Test listing user projects with valid JWT authorization, expect 200 response with list of projects.

title: post api roadmap generate with valid prompt
description: Test generating a roadmap using AI with valid JWT authorization and valid prompt data, expect 200 response with generated roadmap JSON.

title: post api quiz generate with authorization
description: Test generating quiz questions for a roadmap node with valid JWT authorization, expect 200 response with quiz questions and metadata.

title: post api chat send message with authorization
description: Test sending a message to AI chat tutor with valid JWT authorization and valid projectId and message, expect 200 response with AI response and message id.

title: get api profile user stats with authorization
description: Test fetching user profile and stats with valid JWT authorization, expect 200 response with user stats including XP, streak, and learning minutes.

title: post api profile user add xp with valid data
description: Test awarding XP to user with valid JWT authorization and positive XP value, expect 200 response with updated XP and possible level-up metadata.
